24. Polynomial Regression for Machine Learning

05 January 2021 - less than 1 min read time
Tags: Fast Campus ML

Source: Fast Campus, Toward Data Science

Polynomial Regression

\[\hat Y = \hat \beta_0 + \hat \beta_1 X_1 + \hat \beta_2 X_2 + ...\] \[\hat Y = \hat \beta_0 + \hat \beta_1 X_1 + \hat \beta_2 X_1^2 + ...\]
  • When the relationship between independence and dependence variables are non-linear(Find it by plot)
  • Multi linear regression does not satisfy the residual hypothesis.(Residual Plot)
  • Be careful about overfitting when we are adding high order.

with by Mark Joonho Lee
